name: Blackberry Noodle Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375F.
2. Brush a 7 x 11-inch or 9 x 13-inch baking pan with 1 tbsp of the butter (or margarine).
3. In a large pot of salted boiling water, cook noodles until al dente, about 10 minutes; drain in a colander.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine drained noodles, remaining butter, and sugar, apple juice and berries. Mix in eggs.
5. Transfer to prepared baking dish. Sprinkle generously with cinnamon.
6. Bake until golden brown and crisp on top, about 30 minutes.
7. Serves: 10
